executives.name: Stephen Stewart
executives.background: Mr. Stewart is the Chairman of the Orefinders Resources and Mistango River Resources. He has over 15 years of experience in the resource sector, focusing on corporate development and capital markets. He is also the founder of the Young Mining Professionals.
